headline: 3 Top Stocks With Accelerating Earnings and Solid Upside Ahead
summary: MIR, INTU and ANIP screen for earnings acceleration, a signal often tied to future stock gains, as investors look beyond steady EPS growth.

headline: Bridgewater CIO says AI poses existential threat to software firms
summary: Investing.com -- Bridgewater Associates said Monday that artificial intelligence poses an existential threat to legacy software companies, drawing parallels to how Amazon disrupted traditional bookstores in the 1990s.

headline: Intuit (INTU) Just Joined the Fed’s Instant Payments Network
summary: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) is one of the best falling stocks to invest in now. On April 9, Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) announced it had completed the Federal Reserve’s certification and readiness program for the FedNow Service. This means the company is now formally part of the US central bank’s instant payments network. The FedNow Service is […]

headline: How TurboTax Upselling and FedNow Integration At Intuit (INTU) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent days, Intuit has drawn attention as analysts highlighted a sharp customer shift toward higher-priced TurboTax services and the company confirmed it has completed the Federal Reserve’s FedNow certification, expanding instant payment capabilities for small businesses. This combination of richer TurboTax mix and new real-time payments infrastructure is reshaping how Intuit monetizes tax preparation and cash-flow tools across its platform. We’ll now examine how the stronger uptake of...
